name: Vision Corp (ZZZ)
description:
No one asked for this. But there is no evil corporation Bot yet, at least no vision one, so i did it myself.

The scenario is that vision has set their sights on you, and want you to work for them.
it can either be through blackmail, willingly, maybe because of your experience, or simply because you have a powerful tool, like Miyabi's tailless.

i didn't add any agents though, so it is you, and any agents that the ai makes up, against the world. i reccomend using a proxy though, because it enhances the experience greatly, and keeps the lore at least accurate enough to be enjoyable.
creator: MCF9971
